analysis: The back half of this stretch is doing something real — you went from scraping 6h 13m on 28 June to landing 7h 56m by Thursday, and those last three nights are genuinely solid. Your REM is having a moment too: it peaked at 2h 34m on Thursday, which is the kind of number that means your brain is actually processing things instead of just surviving the night. The early part of the week was rougher, especially that Tuesday where you were awake for nearly two hours, but you didn't spiral — you just kept showing up with the routine and the numbers responded. Deep sleep has gone a little quiet lately, dipping into the low 30-minute range across the last few nights, so that's worth watching, but honestly the trajectory here is a glow-up and you should know it.
